title: Terms of Service
description: Terms and conditions for using Financial Edge website and services.
html:
Terms and Conditions

Welcome to Financial Edge. By accessing this website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions of Use, all applicable laws and regulations, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with any applicable local laws.

Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials (information or software) on Financial Edge's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:

  • attempt to decompile or reverse engineer any software contained on Financial Edge's website;
  • remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials; or
  • transfer the materials to another person or "mirror" the materials on any other server.

Disclaimer

The materials on Financial Edge's website are provided on an 'as is' basis. Financial Edge makes no warranties, expressed or implied, and hereby disclaims and negates all other warranties including, without limitation, implied warranties or conditions of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement of intellectual property or other violation of rights.

Further, Financial Edge does not warrant or make any representations concerning the accuracy, likely results, or reliability of the use of the materials on its website or otherwise relating to such materials or on any sites linked to this site.

Limitations

In no event shall Financial Edge or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Financial Edge's website, even if Financial Edge or a Financial Edge authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.

The materials appearing on Financial Edge's website could include technical, typographical, or photographic errors. Financial Edge does not warrant that any of the materials on its website are accurate, complete or current. Financial Edge may make changes to the materials contained on its website at any time without notice.

Links

Financial Edge has not reviewed all of the sites linked to its website and is not responsible for the contents of any such linked site. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement by Financial Edge of the site. Use of any such linked website is at the user's own risk.

Modifications

Financial Edge may revise these terms of service for its website at any time without notice. By using this website you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these Terms and Conditions of Use.

Governing Law

These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Nigeria and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that State or location.
